footer.stack: Made with Nuxt 4, Pinia, Supabase and Stripe.

hero.title: Premium pieces designed to convert into instant favorites.
hero.subtitle: Complete commerce funnel: landing page, social proof, clear offer, and Stripe checkout in a few clicks.
hero.socialProof: 97% of customers validate fit and fabric quality from the first order.

funnel.title: 3-step funnel
funnel.step1Copy: Strong brand universe, premium image, and clear value proposition.
funnel.step2Copy: Three best-sellers with product angle, social proof, and light urgency.
funnel.step3Copy: Pinia cart, then secure Stripe redirection with minimal friction.

products.title: Top 3 products
products.error: Unable to load Supabase products. Check your environment variables.

shipping.card1Copy: Prepared within 24h, tracked shipping in France and Europe.
shipping.card2Copy: Stress-free try-on: easy returns and quick refund.
shipping.card3Copy: Sizing and outfit guidance by email, reply within one business day.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1: How do I choose my size?
faq.a1: Pick your usual size. If you are between sizes, the size guide suggests choosing one size up.
faq.a2: Orders ship within 24h and arrive in 2 to 4 business days in Europe.
faq.a3: Yes, you have 30 days after delivery to return an unworn item.
faq.a4: Yes, checkout uses Stripe with 3D Secure protection and full encryption.

shop.title: Shop
shop.subtitle: All products are synced from Supabase (3 references).

product.sizeGuide: Size guide: fitted cut. If you are between sizes, choose the larger one.
product.shippingInfo: Free shipping above 120 EUR and easy returns for 30 days.
product.shippingDetail: Ships in 24h (except weekends). Tracked delivery in 2 to 4 days across Europe.
product.returnsDetail: Returns within 30 days. Items must be unworn and returned with tags.

success.title: Thanks for your order
success.copy: Your look is reserved. You will receive a tracking email as soon as your parcel leaves our atelier.

cancel.title: No stress
cancel.copy: Your cart is saved. You can resume checkout anytime.
